New Release 2025

Astero Admin - Free Bootstrap 5 Admin Template

Transform your projects with a modern, feature-rich dashboard template.

Demo GitHub
Features

Essential features for Efficient Dashboard Management

Experience intuitive features that simplify management and enhance your workflow.

Built with Bootstrap 5.3

Uses the latest Bootstrap for modern, responsive design.

Light/Dark Mode

Switch between light and dark themes with one click.

Customizable

Change colors and layouts to match your brand easily.

3000+ Icons

Thousands of Remixicon icons ready to use in your projects.

5 Auth Design System

Five ready-made login and signup page designs.

SCSS Support

Advanced styling options for custom designs.

RTL Support

Works perfectly for right-to-left languages.

Optimized Performance

Fast loading times for better user experience.

Fully Responsive

Looks great on phones, tablets, and computers.

Browser Compatibility

Works in all major browsers without issues.

Clean Code Style

Well-organized code that's easy to understand.

Simple Folder Structure

Logically arranged files for quick development.

Why to Choose Astero Admin Bootstrap Template?

Powerful features and modern design elements to build professional dashboards quickly.

Analytics Dashboard
Compact Sidebar
Dark Mode
Various Components
Five Auth Designs
Offcanvas Navbar
Dark mode

Dark mode for better viewing experience.

Switch to dark mode for a sleek, eye-friendly experience anytime.

  • Easier on the eyes
  • Improves readability
  • Minimizes distractions
  • Enhances visual appeal
Subscribe to our newsletter

Stay updated with the latest news and releases from us.

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions and get the support you need.

The package includes a full set of templates, and documentation.

Yes, the theme is fully customizable to match your branding needs.

Absolutely, the theme is designed to be responsive across devices.

Installation is simple and comes with detailed instructions in the docs.
